---
title: "Hersenvoer"
description: "Voer voor de hersenen — over je brein, darmflora, gezondheid en nog veel meer!"
---

Hersenvoer is mijn Nederlandstalige nieuwsbrief over brein, gezondheid en wetenschap!

Zie hieronder de laatste posts van Hersenvoer.

<div id="substack-posts">Laden...</div>

<script>
(function () {
  const container = document.getElementById("substack-posts");
  const FEED_URL  = "https://api.rss2json.com/v1/api.json?rss_url=https://hersenvoer.substack.com/feed";

  fetch(FEED_URL)
    .then(function (response) {
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Netwerkfout: " + response.status);
      return response.json();
    })
    .then(function (data) {
      if (data.status !== "ok" || !Array.isArray(data.items)) {
        throw new Error("Feed onverwacht formaat");
      }

      const posts = data.items.slice(0, 5);

      const html = posts.map(function (post) {
        // Safely extract first image from post content
        const content  = post.content || "";
        const imgMatch = content.match(/<img[^>]+src=["']([^"']+)["']/);
        const imgUrl   = imgMatch ? imgMatch[1] : null;

        // Strip HTML for clean excerpt
        const rawExcerpt = (post.description || "").replace(/<[^>]+>/g, "");
        const excerpt    = rawExcerpt.length > 300
          ? rawExcerpt.slice(0, 300) + "…"
          : rawExcerpt;

        const pubDate = post.pubDate
          ? new Date(post.pubDate).toLocaleDateString("nl-NL", {
              year: "numeric", month: "long", day: "numeric"
            })
          : "";

        const imageHtml = imgUrl
          ? `<div style="flex:0 0 220px;">
               <img src="${imgUrl}" alt="${post.title || ""}"
                    style="width:220px;height:150px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:6px;"
                    loading="lazy">
             </div>`
          : "";

        return `
          <a href="${post.link}" target="_blank" rel="noopener"
             style="text-decoration:none;color:inherit;">
            <div style="
              display:flex;gap:1.5rem;align-items:flex-start;
              margin-bottom:2rem;padding-bottom:2rem;
              border-bottom:1px solid #e0e0e0;
              transition:opacity 0.2s;"
              onmouseover="this.style.opacity='.75'"
              onmouseout="this.style.opacity='1'">

              ${imageHtml}

              <div style="flex:1;">
                <div style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#888;margin-bottom:0.4rem;
                            text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em;">
                  ${pubDate}
                </div>
                <div style="font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:700;
                            margin-bottom:0.6rem;color:#111;">
                  ${post.title || ""}
                </div>
                <p style="margin:0;color:#444;line-height:1.6;font-size:0.95rem;">
                  ${excerpt}
                </p>
                <div style="margin-top:0.8rem;font-size:0.85rem;
                            font-weight:600;color:#5a7a9e;">
                  Lees meer →
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </a>`;
      }).join("");

      container.innerHTML = html || "<p>Geen posts gevonden.</p>";
    })
    .catch(function (err) {
      console.error("Hersenvoer feed fout:", err);
      container.innerHTML =
        "<p>Posts konden niet worden geladen. " +
        "Bekijk de nieuwsbrief direct op " +
        "<a href='https://hersenvoer.substack.com' target='_blank' rel='noopener'>Substack</a>.</p>";
    });
}());
</script>


<iframe src="https://hersenvoer.substack.com/embed"
  width="100%"
  height="150"
  style="border:1px solid #e0e0e0;border-radius:6px;background:#f9f9f9;margin-top:1rem;"
  frameborder="0"
  scrolling="no"
  loading="lazy">
</iframe>
